text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF 27 CCW Chronic Conditions (CC) File Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.3 25 

CANCER_COLORECTAL_EVER 

LABEL: Date that beneficiary first met claims criteria for the colorectal cancer indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This variable shows the date when the beneficiary first met the criteria for the Chronic Condition 
Warehouse (CCW) colorectal cancer indicator. The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have 
never had the condition. 

SHORT
